name: BLUE BIOFUELS, INC.
business: Blue Biofuels, Inc. is a technology company focused on emerging technologies in renewable energy, biofuels, and lignin. Its patented Cellulose-to-Sugar (CTS) process converts cellulosic material into sugars for conversion into biofuels. The company also licensed the Vertimass Process to convert ethanol into sustainable aviation fuel and other renewable biofuels.
sellsTo: Renewable fuels market (cellulosic ethanol, sustainable aviation fuel)

exposures.sentence: The patented CTS process is a continuous mechanical/chemical process for breaking down cellulosic material for conversion into biofuels.

tamClaims.claim: EPA's D3 RIN volume mandates for cellulosic biofuel: 840 million gallons for 2023, 1.09 billion for 2024, 1.19 billion for 2025, proposed 1.30 billion for 2026 and 1.36 billion for 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: The EPA’s final D3 RIN volume mandates for cellulosic biofuel included 840 million gallons for 2023, 1.09 billion gallons for 2024, and 1.19 billion gallons for 2025 (the D3 mandate), and the proposed rule for 2026 and 2027 are 1.30 billion gallons and 1.36 billion gallons, respectively.
